description: Engineers high-dimensional indicators and trains an early-stopped LightGBM model.

inputs.name: fee
inputs.label: Transaction Fee (USD points)
inputs.helpText: Per-trade transaction fee / spread cost in USD points (e.g. 0.001, 0.003, 0.005).

inputs.name: barrier_horizon
inputs.label: Prediction Horizon (min)
inputs.helpText: Triple barrier prediction window in minutes (forecast horizon).

inputs.name: num_leaves
inputs.label: Max Leaves
inputs.helpText: Max number of leaves in one tree.

inputs.name: max_depth
inputs.label: Max Depth
inputs.helpText: Limit the max depth for tree model.

executor.command: [ -f venv/bin/activate ] && . venv/bin/activate || true; PY_BIN="$(command -v python3 || command -v python || true)"; if [ -z "$PY_BIN" ]; then echo 'Python runtime not found'; exit 127; fi; "$PY_BIN" -c "import boto3" >/dev/null 2>&1 || { "$PY_BIN" -m pip install -q boto3 botocore || true; }; "$PY_BIN" features.py --fee {{fee}} --barrier-horizon {{barrier_horizon}} --output xauusd_m1_features_fee_{{fee}}_bh_{{barrier_horizon}}.parquet && "$PY_BIN" train.py --features ../data/processed/xauusd_m1_features_fee_{{fee}}_bh_{{barrier_horizon}}.parquet --model-name {{model_name}} --run-source dashboard --fee {{fee}} --learning-rate {{learning_rate}} --num-leaves {{num_leaves}} --max-depth {{max_depth}}

description: Simulates historical execution under custom entry/exit confidence thresholds and pips fees.

inputs.name: threshold
inputs.label: Confidence Threshold (T)
inputs.helpText: Probability threshold required to trigger Buy or Sell trade entry (35% to 60%).

inputs.name: fee
inputs.label: Spread Fee (USD)
inputs.helpText: The USD point spread cost per trade.

executor.command: [ -f venv/bin/activate ] && . venv/bin/activate || true; PY_BIN="$(command -v python3 || command -v python || true)"; if [ -z "$PY_BIN" ]; then echo 'Python runtime not found'; exit 127; fi; "$PY_BIN" -c "import boto3" >/dev/null 2>&1 || { "$PY_BIN" -m pip install -q boto3 botocore || true; }; "$PY_BIN" inference_sim.py --model {{model}} --features {{features}} --threshold {{threshold}} --fee {{fee}}
